extraction.sheet_name: รายละเอียดการวางพื้น

warnings: This sheet contains 5 distinct connection-detail drawings, each with its own underlined caption naming a different installation condition: SP ภายใน (interior), SP บริเวณพื้น S (transition to S), SP บริเวณพื้นห้องน้ำ (bathroom), SP บริเวณริมคาน (at beam edge), S ระดับสูงกว่าหลังคาน (S above beam level). Previous draft of this file collapsed these into 2 generic elements (SP, S) — per user decision 2026-07-02, now split into 5 separate element_id entries so each installation condition can be reviewed/labeled independently, especially the bathroom condition which likely has different waterproofing requirements not captured by this schema.
Also fixed a unit-conversion bug carried over from the merged version: height_mm was 40 (should be 400 — the drawing shows a 0.40m dimension, and 0.40m = 400mm not 40mm).

SP_at_beam_edge and S_above_beam have lower confidence than the other 3 — their detail drawings have fewer visible dimension callouts at the resolution this review was done at; some fields left null rather than guessed.

Recommend a human reviewer with domain knowledge confirm whether 'main_bar'/'stirrup' is the right field mapping for these precast-plank-to-beam anchor details (the beam/column section schema wasn't designed for this connection-detail sheet type), and whether the bathroom-specific level offset (0.10m) needs its own schema field.
